title: Flaky Cheddar Cheese Crumble
description: An earthy and flaky cheese crumble with a hint of blue food coloring that's perfect for hangover cures in an Argentinian-inspired dish.
instructions: Gently mix the grated cheese and sour cream in a bowl until combined.
Cut the butter into small pieces, then add it slowly to the cheese mixture while whisking continuously. The mixture should start to form a crumbly texture as you stir.
Transfer the cheese crumble mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 10-15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Remove from oven, let cool slightly before serving.
